headline: Lam Research Reshapes Leadership As Q2 Strength Highlights AI Equipment Opportunity
summary: Lam Research reported fiscal Q2 2026 results that exceeded prior expectations, alongside continued demand for its AI related chip equipment. The company promoted Sesha Varadarajan to Chief Operating Officer, signaling a broader shift in its executive structure. Lam Research also appointed Dr. Anirudh Devgan, CEO of Cadence Design Systems, to its board of directors. Lam Research, NasdaqGS:LRCX, is drawing attention not just for its operations in semiconductor equipment but also for a sharp...
